original_query: select min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number) FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 57 * 0.01 AND 77 * 0.01 ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    MIN(c_customer_sk), 
    MIN(ss_item_sk), 
    MIN(sr_ticket_number), 
    MIN(ws_order_number) 
FROM store_sales
JOIN store_returns 
    ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
JOIN item 
    ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND item.i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music')
JOIN customer 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address 
    ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk 
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN')
JOIN household_demographics 
    ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk 
    AND household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 
    AND household_demographics.hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
JOIN date_dim d1 
    ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk 
    AND d1.d_year = 1999
JOIN web_sales 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 
    ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_sales_price / store_sales.ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.57 AND 0.77;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Convert old-style comma joins to explicit JOIN syntax with appropriate ON clauses for better readability and to help the optimizer choose more efficient join orders.
Push filter conditions into JOIN clauses rather than having them in the WHERE clause to allow for earlier filtering of rows.
Replace the calculation '57 * 0.01' and '77 * 0.01' with the constants 0.57 and 0.77 to avoid unnecessary runtime calculations.
